title: gyorgysh/myhq
summary: Self-hosted fleet of autonomous Claude Code agents you command from Telegram. Hierarchy, memory, skills, scheduling, and a web panel.

title: earlvanze/sage-router
summary: Local-first AI model router for serious agents. One endpoint for OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Ollama, NVIDIA NIM, and authorized provider fallback.

title: siddsachar/row-bot
summary: Row-Bot - Personal AI Sovereignty. A local-first AI assistant with integrated tools, a personal knowledge graph, voice, vision, shell, browser automation, scheduled tasks, health tracking, and messaging channels. Run locally via Ollama or add opt-in cloud models. Your data stays on your machine.

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: The open creative AI workspace

title: Kanike-tea/Research-Assistant-Athena
summary: Research Assistant is a local AI-powered dashboard that performs parallel research analysis on any given topic. Built with FastAPI and LangChain, it runs a parallel pipeline using a local Ollama model (llama3.2:1b) to generate an executive summary, keyword cloud, detailed explanation, and academic category simultaneously.

title: Mfrostbutter/ageniusdesk-ce
summary: The command center for n8n automation operators: multi-instance management, real-time error tracking, AI-assisted debugging, a Code Lab, and one-click container deployment. Self-hosted, source-available (MIT).

title: apocas/restai
summary: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...

title: thekaveh/atlas
summary: Atlas — self-hosted, source-configurable, multi-disciplinary engineering platform for gen-AI, ML, and data work. 30+ OSS Docker Compose services (Ollama, LiteLLM, Supabase, n8n, Airflow, Spark, Weaviate, Neo4j, JupyterHub, Ray, ComfyUI, …) pre-wired behind Kong. Interactive TUI wizard, configurable tracks, one-command launch.

summary: Miii-CLI 2026: Zero-Cost Local AI Coding Agent with Ollama – Fully Offline & Private

title: FutronPrime/verity-harness
summary: The open-source Fable alternative — a zero-dependency harness that makes ANY LLM verify instead of assume, persist instead of quit, and reuse before reinventing, with a local failover floor you own.

title: SHRAVANIRANE/mlops-drift-monitor

title: AviSharma01/lyra
summary: Synced, translated Spotify lyrics in a macOS menu bar, with on-device LLM translation. Local-first, private.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: rkfsociety/CodeViper
summary: Локальный AI-агент для программирования — чат, файлы, терминал. Ollama, OpenAI, Gemini, Claude. Без подписок.
